parameters.name: search_station
parameters.description: Search for a train station by name. Returns station names and IDs. Parameter: query (station name to search for, e.g. 'Berlin Hbf')

parameters.name: get_departures
parameters.description: Get upcoming departures from a train station. Accepts station name (auto-resolved) or ID. Parameters: station (station name or ID, e.g. 'Essen Hbf'), duration (optional, minutes to look ahead, default 60)

parameters.name: get_arrivals
parameters.description: Get upcoming arrivals at a train station. Accepts station name (auto-resolved) or ID. Parameters: station (station name or ID, e.g. 'München Hbf'), duration (optional, minutes to look ahead, default 60)

parameters.name: search_journey
parameters.description: Search for train connections between two stations. Accepts station names (auto-resolved) or IDs. Parameters: from (origin station name or ID), to (destination station name or ID), departure (optional, ISO 8601 datetime), results (optional, number of connections, default 3)
